ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transportation_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the transportation mode (e.g., Bus, Train, Bike-Sharing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transportation mode */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the mode can carry */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Average frequency of service (e.g., every 15 minutes) */,
  "is_accessible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the mode is accessible to passengers with disabilities */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the mode is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transportation mode the route belongs to */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting point of the route */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* End point of the route */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Total distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "estimated_travel_time" TEXT /* Estimated travel time for the route */,
  "is_circular" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the route is circular */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the route information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES transportation_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Adaptability, Travel Time, Comfort) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the category in the overall evaluation */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is mandatory for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being evaluated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category being evaluated */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given to the route for the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the score */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who evaluated the route */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments from the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scores_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scores_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scores_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES evaluation_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "is_frequent_user" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the passenger is a frequent user */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the passenger has a disability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who took the trip */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route taken */,
  "trip_date" TEXT /* Date of the trip */,
  "trip_time" TEXT /* Time of the trip */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Starting point of the trip */,
  "destination" TEXT /* End point of the trip */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "is_on_time" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the trip was on time */,
  "is_canceled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the trip was canceled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who gave the feedback */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being feedbacked */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger (1-5) */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "otp_integration" (
  "otp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OTP data */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being integrated */,
  "otp_data" TEXT /* OTP data for the route */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last synchronization with OTP */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the synchronization (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("otp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_otp_integration_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gtfs_integration" (
  "gtfs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GTFS data */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being integrated */,
  "gtfs_data" TEXT /* GTFS data for the route */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last synchronization with GTFS */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the synchronization (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gtfs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gtfs_integration_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps_integration" (
  "gps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPS data */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being integrated */,
  "gps_data" TEXT /* GPS data for the route */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last synchronization with GPS */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the synchronization (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gps_integration_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed during the access (e.g., login, logout, view report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of evaluation */,
  "evaluation_time" TEXT /* Time of evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments from the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
